card.name: Volunteer Firewatch
card.text: Vigilance Coalition — Whenever this creature attacks with one or more tokens, put a +1/+1 counter on it.

card.name: Startouched Reverend
card.text: When this creature enters, put a +1/+1 counter on target creature. {2}{C}, {T}: Fragment this creature. Activate only as a sorcery. (Create a 1/1 token copy of it and put a splinter counter on both. Creatures with splinter counters can't be fragmented.)

card.name: Mire Pathforger
card.text: Devoid (This card has no color.) When you cast this spell, if {C} was spent to cast it, you gain 2 life. Vigilance

card.name: Esteemed Falconress
card.text: When this creature enters, create a 1/1 white Bird creature token with flying.

card.name: Rockpile Brutes
card.text: Whenever you cast an artifact spell, this creature gains first strike until end of turn.

card.name: Awestruck Navigator
card.text: Flying {4}{W}: Creatures you control get +1/+1 until end of turn.

card.name: Mournful Matriarch
card.text: Whenever another creature you control with power 2 or less enters, surveil 1. (Look at the top card of your library. You may put it into your graveyard.)

card.name: Zaila's Willbender
card.text: Devoid (This card has no color.) When this creature enters, exile up to one target nonland permanent with mana value 2 or less until this creature leaves the battlefield.

card.name: Shimmering Skycarp
card.text: Flying Whenever this creature attacks, up to one target creature with lesser power gets +1/+1 and gains flying until end of turn.

card.name: Flagship Auto-Enforcer
card.text: First strike Whenever you cast an artifact spell, this creature gains double strike until end of turn.

card.name: Timely Intervention
card.text: Timely Intervention deals 4 damage to target attacking or blocking creature. If {C} was spent to cast this spell, destroy that creature instead.

card.name: Falconskin Augmentation
card.text: Untap target creature. It gets +1/+1 and gains flying until end of turn. Put a +1/+1 counter on it if you control an artifact.

card.name: Zeppelin Disaster
card.text: Choose one — • Exile target artifact or enchantment. • Fragment target creature you control with mana value 3 or less. (Create a 1/1 token copy of it and put a splinter counter on both. Creatures with splinter counters can't be fragmented.)

card.name: Personal Wingsuit
card.text: When this Equipment enters, draw a card. Equipped creature gets +1/+1 and has flying. Equip {2} ({2}: Attach to target creature you control. Equip only as a sorcery.)

card.name: Gloompool Heron // Into the Mist
card.text:
Flying
---
Draw three cards. (Cast this from your hand or a copy from the battlefield once.)

card.name: Diviner of Relics
card.text: {T}: Add {C}. Spend this mana only to cast a colorless spell or activate an ability of a colorless permanent.

card.name: Task Force Operatives
card.text: Vigilance When this creature enters, investigate. (Create a Clue token. It's an artifact with "{2}, Sacrifice this artifact: Draw a card.")

card.name: Startouched Analyst
card.text: When this creature enters, draw a card. {3}{C}, {T}: Fragment this creature. (Create a 1/1 token copy of it and put a splinter counter on both. Creatures with splinter counters can't be fragmented.)

card.name: Frossenhold Walker
card.text: When this creature enters, target creature gets -2/-0 until your next turn. If {C} was spent to cast this spell, that creature gets -6/-0 until your next turn instead.

card.name: Mastbreaker
card.text: This creature can't be blocked as long as the void called you this turn. (During your turn, the void calls you when a card enters your graveyard from your hand or library.)

card.name: Eldritch Rebuttal
card.text: Counter target spell unless its controller pays {2}. If {C} was spent to cast this spell, counter that spell unless its controller pays {3} instead.

card.name: Innovation Thief
card.text: Whenever this creature attacks, the next noncreature spell you cast this turn costs {1} less to cast.

card.name: Collaborate
card.text: Look at the top three cards of your library. Put two of them into your hand and the rest into your graveyard.

card.name: Taken by the Storm
card.text: Target nonland permanent's owner puts it on their choice of the top or bottom of their library if it's a creature or if the void called you this turn. (During your turn, the void calls you when a card enters your graveyard from your hand or library.)

card.name: Public Exhibition
card.text: Enchant creature or artifact Enchanted permanent is a colorless Clue artifact with "{2}, Sacrifice this artifact: Draw a card." It loses all other types and abilities.

card.name: Writheform
card.text: Until end of turn, target creature has base power and toughness 4/4 and gains hexproof and "Whenever this creature deals combat damage to a player, draw a card."

card.name: Black Site Asylum
card.text: Flash When this artifact enters, tap target creature an opponent controls and put two stun counters on it. {2}, Sacrifice this artifact: Draw a card.

card.name: Gaunt Transient
card.text: Deathtouch This creature gets +1/+1 as long as the void called you this turn. (During your turn, the void calls you when a card enters your graveyard from your hand or library.)

card.name: Luxuries Merchant
card.text: When this creature dies, surveil 1. (Look at the top card of your library. You may put it into your graveyard.)

card.name: Unwelcome Tenant
card.text: Devoid (This card has no color.) When this creature dies, create a 1/1 colorless Eldrazi Scion creature token with "Sacrifice this creature: Add {C}."

card.name: Cruel Patrician
card.text: Lifelink Whenever this creature or another creature you control enters, each opponent loses 1 life. This ability triggers only once each turn.

card.name: Screeching Portent
card.text: Flying When this creature enters, you may discard a card. If you do, create a 2/1 black Warlock creature token.

card.name: Marshwreck Gang
card.text: Menace Whenever this creature attacks, you may sacrifice another creature. If you do, draw a card.

card.name: Speakeasy Brokers
card.text: Flash When this creature enters, until end of turn, up to one target creature gains "When this creature dies, draw a card and create a tapped Treasure token."

card.name: Soultaker Idol
card.text: Devoid (This card has no color.) Flying Swampcycling {2} ({2}, Discard this card: Search your library for a Swamp card, reveal it, put it into your hand, then shuffle.)

card.name: Startouched Acolyte
card.text: When this creature enters, each opponent loses 2 life and you gain 2 life. {2}{C}, {T}: Fragment this creature. (Create a 1/1 token copy of it and put a splinter counter on both. Creatures with splinter counters can't be fragmented.)

card.name: Croak
card.text: This spell costs {2} less to cast if a creature you control died this turn. Destroy target creature.

card.name: Harrowing Transformation
card.text: Target creature you control gains deathtouch until end of turn. When it dies this turn, create a 1/1 colorless Eldrazi Scion creature token with "Sacrifice this creature: Add {C}."

card.name: Learn From Loss
card.text: As an additional cost to cast this spell, sacrifice a creature. Surveil 1, then draw two cards. (To surveil 1, look at the top card of your library. You may put it into your graveyard.)

card.name: Compelled to Die
card.text: Target player sacrifices a nontoken creature of their choice and loses 2 life.

card.name: Nightgrasp
card.text: Enchant creature Enchanted creature gets -2/-2. If the void called you this turn, enchanted creature instead gets -6/-6. (During your turn, the void calls you when a card enters your graveyard from your hand or library.)

card.name: Eldrazi Scion SGP
card.text: Sacrifice this creature: Add {C}.

card.name: Eyekissed Invoker
card.text: Menace {R}, Sacrifice this creature: It deals 2 damage to target player. Activate only if the void called you this turn. (During your turn, the void calls you when a card enters your graveyard from your hand or library.)

card.name: Warcurse Ruminant
card.text: Haste When this creature dies, you may discard a card. If you do, draw a card.

card.name: Steelsuit Consultant
card.text: Haste Whenever one or more artifacts you control enter, this creature deals 1 damage to target player.

card.name: Brineborn Underlings
card.text: At the beginning of combat on your turn, if you've cast a noncreature spell this turn, this creature gets +2/+0 until end of turn. Tap up to one target creature.

card.name: Magma Scribe
card.text: This creature has first strike as long as the void called you this turn. (During your turn, the void calls you when a card enters your graveyard from your hand or library.)

card.name: Startouched Epigone
card.text: When this creature enters, another target creaure gets +2/+0 and gains haste until end of turn. {2}{C}, {T}: Fragment this creature. Activate only as a sorcery. (Create a 1/1 token copy of it and put a splinter counter on both. Creatures with splinter counters can't be fragmented.)

card.name: Iron Triumphant
card.text: This spell costs {2} less to cast if you control two or more artifacts.

card.name: Mantle Breacher // Tear Earth
card.text:
Trample {1}{R}: This creature gets +1/+0 until end of turn.
---
Creatures you control get +1/+0 and gain haste until end of turn. (Cast this from your hand or a copy from the battlefield once.)

card.name: Crimson Gladeguard
card.text: Trample Whenever you discard a card, this creature gets +1/+0 until end of turn.

card.name: Steelsoul Ignition
card.text: Create a 1/1 colorless Construct artifact creature token. When you do, target creature gets +1/+0 and gains haste until end of turn.

card.name: Neon Dreams
card.text: As an additional cost to cast this spell, discard a card. Exile the top two cards of your library. You may play them this turn.

card.name: Jettison
card.text: Choose one — • Target creature you control deals damage equal to its power to any target. Then sacrifice it. • Destroy target artifact.

card.name: Pyre
card.text: Pyre deals 3 damage to target creature. Put a +1/+1 counter on up to one target creature you control.

card.name: Willbreaker Lance
card.text: When this Equipment enters, you may pay {4}. If you do, create a 4/4 colorless Golem artifact creature token and attach this Equipment to it. Equipped creature gets +3/+0 and has menace. Equip {2} ({2}: Attach to target creature you control. Equip only as a sorcery.)

card.name: Wreckage Inquisitors
card.text: When this creature enters, investigate. (Create a Clue token. It's an artifact with "{2}, Sacrifice this artifact: Draw a card.")

card.name: Startouched Arborist
card.text: When this creature enters, search your library for a basic land card, reveal it, put it into your hand, then shuffle. {2}{C}, {T}: Fragment this creature. (Create a 1/1 token copy of it and put a splinter counter on both. Creatures with splinter counters can't be fragmented.)

card.name: Game Hunters
card.text: Whenever you sacrifice a permanent for the first time each turn, put a +1/+1 counter on this creature.

card.name: First Responders
card.text: When this creature enters, investigate. (Create a Clue token. It's an artifact with "{2}, Sacrifice this artifact: Draw a card.") Whenever you sacrifice a Clue, this creature gets +1/+1 and gains trample until end of turn.

card.name: Streetway Incursion
card.text: Choose one — • Create two 1/1 colorless Eldrazi Scion creature tokens with "Sacrifice this creature: Add {C}." • Put a +1/+1 counter on each creature you control.

card.name: World Whisperer
card.text: Devoid (This card has no color.) When this creature enters, if you sacrificed a creature this turn, put a +1/+1 counter on target creature.

card.name: Overzealous Recon
card.text: Vigilance When this creature dies, create a 3/2 colorless Eldrazi creature token.

card.name: Branchbound Speaker
card.text: Vigilance Coalition — Whenever this creature attacks with one or more tokens, this creature gets +1/+1 and gains trample until end of turn.

card.name: Starbreaker Juvenile
card.text: Vigilance, reach Whenever you spend four or more mana to cast a spell, if this creature has no counters on it, put two +1/+1 counters on it.

card.name: Barksplitter Colossus // Winding Roots
card.text:
Trample When this creature enters, you gain 3 life.
---
Surveil 1. You gain 3 life. (Cast this from your hand or a copy from the battlefield once.)

card.name: A Hole in the Sky
card.text: This spell costs {1} less to cast if you control an Eldrazi. Destroy target artifact, enchantment, or creature with flying.

card.name: Eldritch Growth
card.text: Search your library for two basic land cards, put them onto the battlefield tapped, then shuffle. Untap each land named Wastes put onto the battlefield this way.

card.name: Donnybrook
card.text: Target creature you control fights target creature you don't control. Investigate. (Create a Clue token. It's an artifact with "{2}, Sacrifice this artifact: Draw a card.")

card.name: Unethical Enhancements
card.text: Target creature gets +2/+2 and gains trample until end of turn. If it's a token, it also gains indestructible until end of turn.

card.name: Ancient Carapace
card.text: Defender

card.name: Chorus of the Severed
card.text: Menace Whenever you fragment a creature, put a +1/+1 counter on this creature.

card.name: Old Ones Envoy
card.text: This spell costs {1} less to cast for each of up to three colorless nonland permanents you control.

card.name: Rend
card.text: Fragment target creature you control. (Create a 1/1 token copy of it and put a splinter counter on both. Creatures with splinter counters can't be fragmented.)

card.name: Reality Wanes
card.text: Search your library for a basic land card, reveal it, put it into your hand, then shuffle. If a card named Wastes was revealed this way, each opponent loses 1 life and you gain 1 life.

card.name: Incursive Voidmaw // Bare Fangs
card.text:
When you cast this spell, create two 1/1 colorless Eldrazi Scion creature tokens with "Sacrifice this creature: Add {C}."

Target creature gets +2/+0 and gains menace until end of turn. (Cast this from your hand or a copy from the battlefield once.)

card.name: Reservoir Mechan
card.text: {6}, {T}, Sacrifice this creature: Destroy target creature. Activate only as a sorcery.

card.name: Nook Dagger
card.text: When this Equipment enters, attach it to target creature you control. That creature gains deathtouch until end of turn. Equipped creature gets +1/+1. Equip {1} ({1}: Attach to target creature you control. Equip only as a sorcery.)

card.name: Elden Crucible
card.text: When this artifact enters, exile target creature an opponent controls until this artifact leaves the battlefield. {3}, {T}: Surveil 1.

card.name: Corrupted Hedron
card.text: {2}, Sacrifice this artifact: Draw a card. {7}{C}, Sacrifice this artifact: Create a 10/10 colorless Eldrazi creature token.

card.name: Harvest Tenders
card.text: Vigilance, reach

card.name: Zaila's Edict
card.text: Choose one. If {C} was spent to cast this spell, instead choose any number. • You may tap or untap up to one target creature. Put a stun counter on each creature tapped this way. • Counter target spell.

card.name: Psychic Rupture
card.text: Draw two cards. Each player discards two cards.

card.name: Obsessive Ritualist
card.text: When this creature enters, you may have each player discard a card. As long as the void called you this turn, this creature gets +1/+1 and has deathtouch and haste. (During your turn, the void calls you when a card enters your graveyard from your hand or library.)

card.name: Restless Summoners
card.text: {T}: Add {C} or one mana of any color. Whenever you cast a spell with mana value 6 or greater, untap this creature.

card.name: Oathbound Stalwart
card.text: Vigilance When this creature enters, create a 1/1 white Human creature token. Coalition — Whenever this creature attacks with one or more tokens, you may pay {G}{W}. If you do, create a 1/1 white Human creature token.

card.name: Discerning Patron
card.text: When this creature enters, you may pay X life, where X is its power. If you do, surveil X, then draw X cards. {W}{B}: Fragment this creature. Activate only as a sorcery. (Create a 1/1 token copy of it and put a splinter counter on both. Creatures with splinter counters can't be fragmented.)

card.name: Inspiring Orrery
card.text: When this artifact enters, it deals damage equal to the number of other artifacts and/or creatures you control to target creature an opponent controls. Whenever you cast another artifact spell, this artifact becomes a 2/2 artifact creature with haste until end of turn.

card.name: Sludge Trawlers
card.text: Trample Whenever you sacrifice a creature, if it's the first time this ability has resolved this turn, you draw a card and lose 1 life. If it's the second time, put a +1/+1 counter on each of up to two target creatures.

card.name: Spirewisp Wanderer
card.text: Flash Flying When this creature enters, look at the top six cards of your library. You may reveal an instant or sorcery card or a card with a Mythos from among them and put it into your hand. Put the rest on the bottom of your library in a random order.

card.name: Lantha, Task Force Sergeant
card.text: Activated abilities of artifacts you control cost {1} less to activate. This effect can't reduce the mana in that cost to less than one mana. {2}, {T}: Investigate. (Create a Clue token. It's an artifact with "{2}, Sacrifice this artifact: Draw a card.")

card.name: Aviary Whisperer
card.text: Flying When this creature enters, surveil 1. (Look at the top card of your library. You may put it into your graveyard.) {2}{U}, Discard this card: Counter target noncreature spell.

card.name: Black Site Enhancer
card.text: Vigilance Colorless spells you cast cost {1} less to cast.

card.name: Inkwing Kite
card.text: Flying Whenever the void calls you, draw a card. This ability triggers only once each turn. (During your turn, the void calls you when a card enters your graveyard from your hand or library.)

card.name: Malformed Initiate
card.text: At the beginning of your upkeep, you may pay {BR} and discard a card. If you do, put a +1/+1 counter on this creature and it gains menace until end of turn. When this creature dies, it deals damage equal to its power to any target.

card.name: Voice of the Roaring Wind
card.text: Trample Creature spells you control with mana value 4 or greater can't be countered. {5}{R}{G}: Until end of turn, each creature you control gains trample and haste and gets +X/+X, where X is its power.

card.name: In Strength Entwined
card.text: Creature tokens you control get +1/+1.

card.name: Karsten, the Spinner
card.text: Deathtouch, lifelink Whenever Karsten deals combat damage to a player, exile up to one other target creature you control. Return it to the battlefield under its owner's control at the beginning of the next end step with a +1/+1 counter on it.

card.name: Tormented Eulogist
card.text: Haste Whenever this creature attacks, until end of turn, you may have its base power become equal to the amount of mana you've spent to cast spells this turn.

card.name: Ravaged Eviscerator
card.text: Devoid (This card has no color.) When this creature enters, create a 1/1 colorless Eldrazi Scion creature token with "Sacrifice this creature: Add {C}." Whenever a Scion you control dies, if this creature has no counters on it, put a +1/+1 counter on it.

card.name: Artillery Commander
card.text: Whenever another nontoken artifact you control enters, this creature deals 1 damage to each opponent and you gain 1 life. Whenever two or more artifact creatures you control attack, exile the top card of your library. You may play it this turn.

card.name: Concerning Discoveries
card.text: When this enchantment enters, you may sacrifice a Clue. If you do, draw a card. Otherwise, investigate. (Create a Clue token. It's an artifact with "{2}, Sacrifice this artifact: Draw a card.") Once each turn, when you sacrifice a Clue, you may tap or untap target permanent.

card.name: Sky Force Retiree
card.text: This creature can't be blocked by creatures with power 3 or greater. Coalition — Whenever this creature attacks with one or more tokens, target creature can't be blocked by creatures with power 3 or greater this turn.

card.name: Scape Surveyor
card.text: Flying When this creature enters, you may search your library for a basic Plains card or a land card named Wastes, reveal it, put it into your hand, then shuffle.

card.name: Highforged Overseer
card.text: Whenever another nontoken artifact you control enters, you may pay {1}. When you do, put a +1/+1 counter on target creature you control.

card.name: Aspiring Artisan
card.text: Vigilance {T}: Create a 1/1 colorless Construct artifact creature token. Activate only if you've cast an artifact spell this turn.

card.name: North District Prior
card.text: This creature enters with a +1/+1 counter on it for each other creature you control. {2}{W}, Tap three untapped creatures you control: Fragment this creature. Activate only as a sorcery. (Create a 1/1 token copy of it and put a splinter counter on both. Creatures with splinter counters can't be fragmented.)

card.name: Cabaret Seductress
card.text: Lifelink Whenever another creature you control with power 2 or less enters, this creature gets +1/+0 until end of turn.

card.name: Stylla, Opulent Paragon
card.text: When Stylla enters, create a Treasure token. When Stylla dies, draw a card. You lose 1 life. If an ability of a creature you control with power 2 or less would trigger, you may instead choose one that hasn't been chosen this turn — • Create a Treasure token. • Draw a card. You lose 1 life.

card.name: Frontline Cavalier
card.text: Vigilance Coalition — Whenever this creature attacks with one or more tokens, creatures you control get +1/+1 until end of turn.

card.name: Warpwire Chassis
card.text: When this Equipment enters, you may pay {2}. If you do, create a 1/1 white Human creature token and attach this Equipment to it. Equipped creature gets +1/+1 for each creature you control and has flying. Equip {2} ({2}: Attach to target creature you control. Equip only as a sorcery.)

card.name: Industry Kingpins
card.text: When this creature enters, choose one — • Exile target creature with power 4 or greater. Put two +1/+1 counters on this creature. • Create two 2/2 white and black Human Bard creature tokens.

card.name: Never Seen Again
card.text: Exile target creature. Its controller creates a 1/1 colorless Eldrazi Scion creature token with "Sacrifice this creature: Add {C}."

card.name: Ether Joyride
card.text: Fragment target creature you own, then exile it. You may cast it for as long as it remains exiled. (Create a 1/1 token copy of it and put a splinter counter on both. Creatures with splinter counters can't be fragmented.)

card.name: Faculty of Engineering
card.text: Flash When this artifact enters, creatures you control gain indestructible until end of turn. {5}{W}, {T}: Put a +1/+1 counter on each creature you control. Activate only as a sorcery.

card.name: Null Emissary // Catatonia
card.text:
Vigilance Creatures that are one or more colors enter tapped.
---
Tap up to one target creature. Draw a card. (Cast this from your hand or a copy from the battlefield once.)

card.name: Watchman of the Deep
card.text: Defender As long as the void called you this turn, this creature gets +3/+0 and can attack as though it didn't have defender. (During your turn, the void calls you when a card enters your graveyard from your hand or library.) {1}{U}: Surveil 1.

card.name: Inspired Retrofitter
card.text: Whenever this creature becomes tapped, draw a card, then discard a card. At the beginning of each end step, if you've cast a noncreature spell this turn, put a +1/+1 counter on this creature and untap it.

card.name: Port Inspector
card.text: When this creature enters, investigate. (Create a Clue token. It's an artifact with "{2}, Sacrifice this artifact: Draw a card.") Whenever you sacrifice a Clue, surveil 1. (Do this before you draw.)

card.name: Ego Devourer
card.text: You may have this creature enter as a copy of any creature on the battlefield, except it has this card's abilities. {U}{U}, {T}: Fragment this creature. (Create a 1/1 token copy of it and put a splinter counter on both. Creatures with splinter counters can't be fragmented.)

card.name: Adaptive Lieutenant
card.text: Whenever this creature deals combat damage to a player, investigate. (Create a Clue token. It's an artifact with "{2}, Sacrifice this artifact: Draw a card.") Whenever you sacrifice a Clue, this creature gets +1/+0 until end of turn.

card.name: Void Empyrean // Spurn Reality
card.text:
Flying When you cast this spell, return up to one target creature you don't control to its owner's hand. Surveil 3.
---
Return target creature with mana value 3 or less to its owner's hand. (Cast this from your hand or a copy from the battlefield once.)

card.name: In the Nick of Time
card.text: Counter up to one target spell, up to one target activated ability, and up to one target triggered ability.

card.name: Fade
card.text: Return target nonland permanent to its owner's hand. Investigate. (Create a Clue token. It's an artifact with "{2}, Sacrifice this artifact: Draw a card.")

card.name: Piecing it Together
card.text: Enchant creature Enchanted creature gets +1/+0. Whenever enchanted creature deals combat damage to a player, sacrifice any number of Clues you control, then draw that many cards.

card.name: Ancestral Voidstone
card.text: When this artifact enters, surveil 2. (Look at the top two cards of your library, then put any number of them into your graveyard and the rest on top of your library in any order.) {T}: Add {C}. {1}, {T}: Surveil 1.

card.name: Deepwater Whispers
card.text: Create an X/4 blue Jellyfish Horror creature token with flying, where X is the number of instant cards, sorcery cards, and cards with a Mythos in your graveyard.

card.name: Scour the Records
card.text: Look at the top four cards of your library. If there are seven or more cards in your graveyard, look at the top seven cards of your library instead. Put two of them into your hand and the rest on the bottom of your library in a random order.

card.name: Wiped Clean
card.text: Flash Enchant nonland permanent When this Aura enters, if {C} was spent to cast it, counter all activated and triggered abilities of enchanted permanent. Enchanted permanent loses all abilities.

card.name: Spill the Beans
card.text: Draw a card. Investigate. (Create a Clue token. It's an artifact with "{2}, Sacrifice this artifact: Draw a card.")

card.name: Shingle Crawler
card.text: Flying This creature can't block. Whenever this creature attacks, surveil 1. (Look at the top card of your library. You may put it into your graveyard.)

card.name: Kavalesk's Reshapen
card.text: As an additional cost to cast this spell, you may pay {1}{R} and discard a card. If you do, copy this spell. (The copy becomes a token.) Haste

card.name: Holism Seeker
card.text: When this creature enters, destroy up to one target artifact or enchantment. {3}{C}, {T}: Fragment this creature. (Create a 1/1 token copy of it and put a splinter counter on both. Creatures with splinter counters can't be fragmented.)

card.name: Yestergrove Relic
card.text: When this creature enters, investigate. (Create a Clue token. It's an artifact with "{2}, Sacrifice this artifact: Draw a card.") Whenever you draw your second card each turn, you may put a land card from your hand onto the battlefield tapped.

card.name: Analytic Processor
card.text: As an additional cost to cast this spell, pay {2} or sacrifice a Clue. Vigilance, reach

card.name: Botanical Conference
card.text: Vigilance Coalition — Whenever this creature attacks with one or more tokens, put up to that many land cards from your hand onto the battlefield tapped. {3}{G}, {T}: Create a tapped 1/1 white Human creature token. Draw a card.

card.name: Voices in the Mist
card.text: Devoid (This card has no color.) Trample When this creature enters, put X +1/+1 counters on it, then you may sacrifice another creature. When you do, this creature fights target creature you don't control.

card.name: Savage Broodmother
card.text: Devoid (This card has no color.) This creature can't be blocked by creatures with power 2 or less. Whenever this creature deals combat damage to a player, create a 1/1 colorless Eldrazi Scion creature token with "Sacrifice this creature: Add {C}."

card.name: Scapebender // Pierce Infinity
card.text:
Trample Whenever you spend seven or more mana to cast a spell, put three +1/+1 counters on this creature.
---
Put X +1/+1 counters on target creature. (Cast this from your hand or a copy from the battlefield once.)

card.name: Bitten By the Void
card.text: Choose one — • Target creature you control deals damage equal to its power to target creature you don't control. • Create a 1/1 colorless Eldrazi Scion creature token with "Sacrifice this creature: Add {C}."

card.name: Occupation
card.text: Gain control of target artifact or creature until end of turn and untap it. It gains haste until end of turn. If it's not a creature, until end of turn, it becomes a creature with power and toughness equal to its mana value.

card.name: Blinding Immolation
card.text: This spell costs {2} less to cast if the void called you this turn. (During your turn, the void calls you when a card enters your graveyard from your hand or library.) Blinding Immolation deals 5 damage to target creature.

card.name: For All of Calloran
card.text: Creatures you control get +3/+3 until end of turn. Creature tokens you control also gain trample until end of turn.

card.name: Confidential Science
card.text: When this enchantment enters, draw a card. Whenever you cast a spell with mana value 4 or greater, investigate. (Create a Clue token. It's an artifact with "{2}, Sacrifice this artifact: Draw a card.")

card.name: Cataclysm Constable
card.text: Vigilance Whenever one or more creatures you control deal combat damage to a player, investigate. (Create a Clue token. It's an artifact with "{2}, Sacrifice this artifact: Draw a card.")

card.name: Karsten's Thought Police
card.text: When this creature enters, look at target opponent's hand and choose a nonland card from it. If you do, that player discards that card, then draws a card. {4}{C}, {T}: Fragment this creature. Activate only as a sorcery. (Create a 1/1 token copy of it and put a splinter counter on both. Creatures with splinter counters can't be fragmented.)

card.name: Elite Reserve
card.text: Flash {1}, Sacrifice another creature or discard a card: This creature gains indestructible until end of turn. Tap it.

card.name: Unsettling Showman
card.text: Menace Once each turn, when another creature you control enters, you may pay life equal to its power. If you do, put a +1/+1 counter on this creature.

card.name: Corpse Inspector
card.text: Once each turn, when the void calls you, you may exile target card from your graveyard. (During your turn, the void calls you when a card enters your graveyard from your hand or library.) When this creature dies, create a 2/1 black Warlock creature token for each creature card exiled with it. Add {B} for each noncreature card exiled with it.

card.name: Dissentor Colossus
card.text: When this creature enters, you may discard a card. When you do, fragment target creature you control. (Create a 1/1 token copy of it and put a splinter counter on both. Creatures with splinter counters can't be fragmented.) Whenever a creature you control with power 2 or less attacks, it gains deathtouch and lifelink until end of turn.

card.name: Sole Survivor
card.text: When this creature enters, create a 1/1 colorless Eldrazi Scion creature token with "Sacrifice this creature: Add {C}." Whenever this creature or another creature you control dies, each opponent loses 1 life and you gain 1 life.

card.name: Flamerush
card.text: Flamerush deals 2 damage divided as you choose among one or two target creatures.

card.name: Quick and Painful
card.text: Destroy target creature if it has power 3 or less or if the void called you this turn. (During your turn, the void calls you when a card enters your graveyard from your hand or library.)

card.name: Ancient Stirrings
card.text: Look at the top five cards of your library. You may reveal a colorless card from among them and put it into your hand. Put the rest on the bottom of your library in any order.

card.name: Formless Scape
card.text: Enchant land When this Aura enters, investigate. (Create a Clue token. It's an artifact with "{2}, Sacrifice this artifact: Draw a card.") Whenever enchanted land is tapped for mana, its controller adds an additional {C}.

card.name: For the Cause
card.text: As long as it's your turn, creatures you control get +1/+0. Once each turn, when an attacking creature you control dies, you may discard a card. If you do, draw a card.

card.name: Ashen Ravager
card.text: At the beginning of your end step, put a +1/+1 counter on this creature if the void called you this turn. (During your turn, the void calls you when a card enters your graveyard from your hand or library.) When this creature dies, if its power is 3 or greater, it deals 3 damage to target player.

card.name: Mutation Investigator
card.text: {T}: Add {G}. {1}, {T}: Put a +1/+1 counter on target creature with mana value 4 or greater. Activate only as a sorcery.

card.name: Preemption Engineer
card.text: During your turn, this creature has first strike. At the beginning of combat on your turn, you may tap this creature. If you do, target artifact creature gets +2/+0 and gains first strike until end of turn.

card.name: Ritual Archivist
card.text: Menace Whenever this creature attacks, exile the top card of your library. You may play cards exiled with this creature as long as the void called you this turn. (During your turn, the void calls you when a card enters your graveyard from your hand or library.)

card.name: Brazen Sootbellow
card.text: Flying, haste Whenever this creature attacks, create a Treasure token. Pay {R} or tap an untapped artifact you control: This creature gets +1/+0 until end of turn.

card.name: Forgotten Fableweaver // Reprise
card.text:
Whenever you cast a noncreature spell, this creature gets +1/+0 until end of turn. Create a tapped Treasure token.
---
Copy target instant or sorcery spell you control. You may choose new targets for the copy. (Cast this from your hand or a copy from the battlefield once.)

prop.type: Creature — Human Bard Horror // Instant — Mythos

card.name: Cinder Fanatic
card.text: Whenever you attack, if the void called you this turn, target creature can't block this turn. (During your turn, the void calls you when a card enters your graveyard from your hand or library.)

card.name: Boulevard Ambusher
card.text: Devoid (This card has no color.) Menace This creature enters with a +1/+1 counter on it for each mana from a Scion spent to cast it.

card.name: Blood Soliloquy
card.text: As an additional cost to cast this spell, sacrifice a creature or discard a card. Destroy target creature.

card.name: In Eldritch Flame
card.text: Devoid (This card has no color.) Until end of turn, if a creature an opponent controls would die, exile it instead. In Eldritch Flame deals 2 damage to each creature.

card.name: North Salcman Vigil
card.text: Look at the top three cards of your library. Put one into your hand and the rest into your graveyard. {1}{B}, Exile this card from your graveyard: You draw a card and lose 1 life. Activate only if the void called you this turn. (During your turn, the void calls you when a card enters your graveyard from your hand or library.)

card.name: Unnatural Torment
card.text: All creatures get -2/-2 until end of turn. Surveil 2.

card.name: Tendrils in the Loch
card.text: Search your library for a card, put that card into your hand, then shuffle. Create two 1/1 colorless Eldrazi Scion creature tokens with "Sacrifice this creature: Add {C}."

card.name: Soulrender // Anoint in Fire
card.text:
Trample Whenever you cast this spell or spend seven or more mana to cast another spell, this card deals 3 damage to target player.
---
Anoint in Fire deals X damage to any nonplayer target. (Cast this from your hand or a copy from the battlefield once.)

card.name: Titan's Effigy // Realmbreak
card.text:
When you cast this spell, create a 1/1 colorless Eldrazi Scion creature token with "Sacrifice this creature: Add {C}."
---
Create a 10/10 colorless Eldrazi creature token. (Cast this from your hand or a copy from the battlefield once.)

card.name: Three-Eye Observer
card.text: At the beginning of your upkeep, surveil 2. (Look at the top two cards of your library, then put any number of them into your graveyard and the rest on top of your library in any order.)

card.name: Endward Harbinger
card.text: Flying, lifelink Other colorless creatures you control get +1/+1.

card.name: Inkrealm Drowner
card.text: When you cast this spell, tap all creatures target player controls. Put a stun counter on each of up to two of those creatures. Trample

card.name: Eternity Takes
card.text: As an additional cost to cast this spell, pay {2} or behold a creature with mana value 7 or greater. (Choose a creature you control with mana value 7 or greater, or reveal a creature card with mana value 7 or greater from your hand.) Exile target nonland permanent.

card.name: Moonstone Splinter
card.text: {T}: Add {C}. {T}: Add one mana of any color. Spend this mana only to cast a Mythos spell.

card.name: Fateblur Cloak
Impure Creation
card.text: Menace This creature attacks each combat if able.

card.name: Hall of Innovation
card.text: {T}: Add {C}. {2}, {T}: Target artifact creature you control can't be blocked this turn.

card.name: Promising Vista
card.text: This land enters tapped. When this land enters, you may pay 2 life. If you do, add {C}. {T}, Sacrifice this land: Search your library for a basic land card, put it onto the battlefield, then shuffle.

card.name: Vintage Fanatic
card.text: When this creature enters, you may return another target creature you control to its owner's hand. Whenever a creature you control with power 2 or less enters, draw a card. This ability triggers only once each turn.

card.name: Ulamog, the Earth Engulfed
card.text: Indestructible Eldrazi you control have annihilator 1. (Whenever a creature with annihilator 1 attacks, defending player sacrifices a permanent.) Whenever Ulamog attacks, search target opponent's library for up to seven cards and exile them. That player shuffles.

card.name: Ruinate
card.text: Destroy all noncreature, nonland permanents with mana value 3 or less.

card.name: Stelver, the Eyes and Ears
card.text: Flash When Stelver enters, return up to one target creature each player controls to its owner's hand. Investigate. Whenever you sacrifice a Clue, until end of turn, you may cast creature spells as though they had flash.

card.name: Bear Witness
card.text: Fragment all creatures you control. (To fragment a creature, create a 1/1 token copy of it and put a splinter counter on both. Creatures with splinter counters can't be fragmented.)

card.name: Zaila's Arbiter // Eerie Stillness
card.text:
Flash When you cast this spell, exile up to one target nonland permanent. While it's exiled, its owner may cast it by paying {2} rather than its mana cost. Flying
---
Until your next turn, spells cost {1} more to cast. (Cast this from your hand or a copy from the battlefield once.)

card.name: High Sergeant Liano
card.text: When Liano enters, create two 1/1 white Human creature tokens. Coalition — Whenever Liano attacks with one or more tokens, draw a card.

card.name: Grand Triarch
card.text: Devoid (This card has no color.) You and other colorless permanents you control have hexproof. Whenever you cast a colorless spell, create a 4/4 colorless Eldrazi Angel creature token with flying.

card.name: Evelline, Ark of Salvation
card.text: Flying, vigilance Whenever Evelline enters or attacks, return target artifact or creature card with mana value 3 or less from your graveyard to the battlefield. If it's a creature card and Evelline is attacking, you may have it enter tapped and attacking. Crew 4

card.name: Otherworldly Gyre
card.text: When this enchantment enters, exile all creatures with mana value 2 or less until this enchantment leaves the battlefield. {X}{C}{C}: Search your library for a colorless creature card with mana value X or less, exile it, then shuffle. This enchantment becomes a copy of that card. Activate only as a sorcery. (This lasts indefinitely.)

card.name: Bolton, Wharf Administrator
card.text: Vigilance Each spell a player casts costs {1} more to cast for each other spell that player has cast this turn.

card.name: Devonia, Lost Ministrix
card.text: Devoid (This card has no color.) When Devonia enters, mill two cards. Once each turn, when the void calls you, you may exile target instant or sorcery card from your graveyard and cast a copy of it. (During your turn, the void calls you when a card enters your graveyard from your hand or library.)

card.name: Scion of Insanity
card.text: Flying This creature gets +3/+3 as long as the number of cards in your library is less than half the minimum deck size. {1}{U}, Discard this card: Mill three cards, then draw a card. Shuffle this card into your library.

card.name: Inkrealm Guardian // All Collapses
card.text:
Trample, ward {2} Whenever a creature you control deals combat damage to a player, draw two cards.
---
Creatures you control can't be blocked this turn. (Cast this from your hand or a copy from the battlefield once.)

card.name: Roiling Undertow
card.text: Fragment target creature you control with mana value X or less. (Create a 1/1 token copy of it and put a splinter counter on both. Creatures with splinter counters can't be fragmented.) Return up to X target creatures to their owners' hands.

card.name: Friede, Weave Dancer
card.text: Flying Whenever you cast a noncreature spell, create a 1/1 blue Illusion creature token. {1}{U}, {T}, Tap any number of untapped creatures you control with total power X: Copy target noncreature spell you control with mana value X or less. You may choose new targets for the copy. (Copies of permanent spells become tokens.)

card.name: Haunted Starlet
card.text: Lifelink Whenever another creature you control with power 2 or less enters, you lose 1 life and create a 1/1 colorless Eldrazi Scion creature token with "Sacrifice this creature: Add {C}." This ability triggers only once each turn.

card.name: Insatiate Slasher
card.text: You may cast this card from your graveyard as long as the void called you this turn. If you do, when it enters, it gains haste until end of turn. (During your turn, the void calls you when a card enters your graveyard from your hand or library.)

card.name: Strike Suppressor
card.text: Flash When this creature enters, other creatures get -1/-1 until end of turn. Whenever an opponent creates one or more creature tokens, that player loses that much life and you gain that much life.

card.name: Fathomless Invocations
card.text: Starting with you and until all modes have been chosen, each player chooses one that hasn't been chosen — • That player loses 7 life. • That player discards their hand. • That player exiles all but the bottom six cards of their library. • Each of that player's opponents creates a 10/10 colorless Eldrazi creature token.

card.name: Emrakul's Conscriptor
card.text: When you cast this spell, return target creature card from your graveyard to the battlefield. It's a 10/10 with trample and annihilator 2. (This lasts indefinitely. Whenever it attacks, defending player sacrifices two permanents.) Trample, annihilator 2

card.name: Esme, Lost to Avarice
card.text: Once each turn, when the void calls you, each opponent loses 1 life and you gain 1 life. (During your turn, the void calls you when a card enters your graveyard from your hand or library.) {3}{B}{B}: If there are seven or more cards in your graveyard, Esme gains flying and becomes a 7/7 Horror in addition to her other types. Activate only as a sorcery.

card.name: Ichor Winnower
card.text: Devoid (This card has no color.) First strike Whenever an opponent casts a spell with an even mana value, this creature deals 1 damage to them.

card.name: Herald of Darkest Skies // Arise
card.text:
When you cast this spell, any number of target players each mill ten cards. Flying
---
You may cast target creature card from your graveyard this turn. (Cast this from your hand or a copy from the battlefield once.)

card.name: Bloodbone Pietist
card.text: Whenever this creature deals combat damage to a player, mill a card. You may play that card this turn. {2}{R}, Discard a card: This creature gets +2/+2 until end of turn. If there are seven or more cards in your graveyard, put two +1/+1 counters on this creature instead.

card.name: Bender of Will // Unending Pain
card.text:
Whenever a player casts a spell that targets a single other creature, you may copy that spell. That copy targets this creature.
---
Target creature gains double strike until end of turn. (Cast this from your hand or a copy from the battlefield once.)

card.name: Careening Steam Engine
card.text: When this artifact enters, it deals 1 damage to each creature you don't control. {1}{R}, {T}: Target creature you control gets +1/+0 and gains trample until end of turn. Activate only as a sorcery.

card.name: Deathscorn Aspect
card.text: Haste When this creature enters, you may discard a card. If you do, draw a card. At the beginning of your end step, sacrifice this creature unless the void called you this turn. (During your turn, the void calls you when a card enters your graveyard from your hand or library.)

card.name: Gene Recombinators
card.text: {1}, Sacrifice two creatures: Create an X/X green Ooze creature token, where X is the total power of the sacrificed creatures. Activate only as a sorcery. Coalition — Whenever this creature attacks with one or more tokens, create a token that's a copy of target token you control.

card.name: Curious Botanist
card.text: Whenever this creature enters or attacks, choose one — • Investigate. (Create a Clue token. It's an artifact with "{2}, Sacrifice this artifact: Draw a card.") • You may play an additional land this turn. • You gain 2 life.

card.name: Astrum Weaver // Grisly Bloom
card.text:
Flash Reach At the beginning of each end step, if you spent mana from a Scion this turn, put a +1/+1 counter on each creature you control.
---
Create three 1/1 colorless Eldrazi Scion creature tokens with "Sacrifice this creature: Add {C}." (Cast this from your hand or a copy from the battlefield once.)

card.name: Deep Cover Prowler
card.text: Whenever a creature you control becomes the target of a spell or ability an opponent controls, investigate. If you've already created a Clue this turn, draw a card instead. {3}{G}: Fragment this creature. (Create a 1/1 token copy of it and put a splinter counter on both. Creatures with splinter counters can't be fragmented.)

card.name: Awoken Cordillera
card.text: Devoid (This card has no color.) Trample When this creature dies, return it to the battlefield tapped and face down. For as long as it's face down, it's a land with "{T}: Add {C}{C}" and "Whenever you spend your seventh total mana to cast spells each turn, tap this land and turn it face up."

card.name: Kavalesk, the Dark Exalted // Glimpse the Eye
card.text:
You may cast spells from your graveyard as long as they were put there from your hand or library this turn.
---
Discard up to three cards, then draw that many cards. (Cast this from your hand or a copy from the battlefield once.)

prop.type: Legendary Creature — Zombie Warlock // Sorcery — Mythos

card.name: Grand Awakening
card.text: Search your library for a creature card with mana value X or less, put it onto the battlefield, then shuffle. Create a token that's a copy of it, except it isn't legendary and has haste and "Sacrifice this creature at the beginning of the next end step."

card.name: Population Boom
card.text: If one or more tokens would be created under your control, twice that many of those tokens are created instead. {4}{G}{W}: Until end of turn, creatures you control have base power and toughness equal to the number of creatures you control.

card.name: Olmin, Triune Liaison
card.text: Whenever you cast a spell, if {C} was spent to cast it, draw a card. Then if {C}{C}{C} was spent to cast it, copy it. You may choose new targets for the copy. (Copies of permanent spells become tokens.)

card.name: Something in the Soil
card.text: You get a soil counter. Then mill X cards, where X is twice the number of soil counters you have. When you do, you may return a permanent card with mana value X or less from your graveyard to the battlefield. A deck can have any number of cards named Something in the Soil.

card.name: Elisa, Hand of Torvinald
card.text: When Elisa enters, you may activate one of her abilities without paying its costs. {2}{R}{W}, Tap two untapped artifacts and/or creatures you control: Put two +1/+1 counters and a flying counter on target artifact you control. You may have it become a 0/0 artifact creature.

card.name: Efraim, High Alderman
card.text: Lifelink At the beginning of your end step, if you gained 3 or more life this turn, return up to one target creature card with mana value 3 or less from your graveyard to the battlefield with a finality counter and a lifelink counter on it.

card.name: Essence Ripper
card.text: When this creature enters, exile the top two cards of each player's library face down. You may look at them while they remain exiled. {B}, Discard a card: Until end of turn, you may play target card exiled with this creature. You may spend mana of any type to cast spells this way. Activate only as a sorcery.

card.name: Skittering Swarmlord
card.text: Devoid (This card has no color.) Reach When you cast this spell and at the beginning of your upkeep, you may exile target creature card from a graveyard. If you do, create a 1/1 colorless Eldrazi Scion creature token with "Sacrifice this creature: Add {C}."

card.name: Vile Reef Inquisitor
card.text: Lifelink Whenever another nontoken creature you control dies, investigate. You lose 1 life. Sacrifice three Clues: Search your library for a card, put it into your hand, then shuffle.

card.name: Lostlands Auspex
card.text: Flying If you would create one or more tokens, you may draw that many cards instead. Do this only once each turn.

card.name: Reality Cusp
card.text: As this land enters, you may choose a color. If you do, it enters tapped and you gain 1 life. {T}: Add {C} or one mana of the chosen color.

card.name: Lost to Endless Scripture
card.text: When this enchantment enters, return target card with a Mythos from your graveyard to your hand. Whenever you cast a copy of a creature's Mythos, fragment that creature. (Create a 1/1 token copy of it and put a splinter counter on both. Creatures with splinter counters can't be fragmented.)

card.name: Thoughtscraper
card.text: As this creature enters, choose a card name. Triggered abilities of sources with the chosen name don't trigger. (A triggered ability uses the words "when," "whenever," or "at.")

card.name: Ulamog's Aspirant
card.text: When this creature enters, exile up to one other target nonland permanent until this creature leaves the battlefield. {5}: Destroy this creature. Its controller draws three cards. Any player may activate this ability.

card.name: Living Apogee
card.text: You may pay {7} rather than pay the mana cost of spells you cast.

card.name: Children of the Heralds
card.text: Whenever you cast this spell or another colorless spell, you may put a colorless permanent card with lesser mana value from your hand onto the battlefield. Eldrazi you control get +1/+1 for each other Eldrazi you control.

card.name: Supreme Desecrator
card.text: Trample Lands your opponents control have "{T}: Add {C}" and "Whenever this land is tapped to add mana other than {C}, its controller loses 3 life."

card.name: Scourge of Aeons
card.text: Flying, trample This creature enters with three doom counters on it. At the beginning of your end step, remove a doom counter from this creature. If you do, destroy all other nonland permanents with mana value greater than or equal to the number of doom counters on it.

card.name: The West District Hangar
card.text: As long as you control four or more artifacts with different names, if a source you control would deal damage to an opponent or permanent an opponent controls, it deals that much damage plus 2 instead. {T}: Add {R}{R}. This mana can't be spent to cast nonartifact spells.

card.name: Blinding Aperture
Lantha's Journal
card.text: {1}, {T}: Draw a card, then discard a card. Put a page counter on Lantha's Journal. {1}, {T}, Remove X page counters from Lantha's Journal: Exile target card with mana value X or less from your graveyard. You may cast a copy of it without paying its mana cost. Activate only as a sorcery.

card.name: Leonard, Experiment Zero
card.text: When Leonard enters, create a 1/1 colorless Eldrazi Scion creature token with "Sacrifice this creature: Add {C}." Coalition — Whenever Leonard attacks with one or more tokens, you may have all attacking tokens become copies of target nonlegendary creature until end of turn.

card.name: Lightwire Swarm
card.text: Flying At the beginning of your end step, if you've drawn two or more cards this turn, create a 1/1 colorless Thopter artifact creature token with flying. If you've drawn three or more cards this turn, create two of those tokens instead.

card.name: Salar, Calloran's Defiance
card.text: Trample At the beginning of your second main phase, if you've spent six or more mana this turn, untap all creatures you control. After this phase, there's an additional combat phase.

card.name: Inventors' Exhibition
card.text: Reveal the top six cards of your library. You may put an artifact card and/or a creature card each with mana value 3 or less from among them onto the battlefield. Put the rest on the bottom of your library in a random order.

card.name: Torvinald, Iron Eminence
card.text: Vigilance, ward {2} At the beginning of your upkeep, put a +1/+1 counter on each creature you control.

card.name: Greytide Specter
card.text: Devoid (This card has no color.) When you cast this spell, return any number of nonland cards from your graveyard to your hand, then discard that many cards. Flying

card.name: Soulflame Immolator
card.text: Flying Ward—Pay 4 life. Pay X life: Fragment target nontoken creature you control with mana value X. Activate only as a sorcery. (Create a 1/1 token copy of it and put a splinter counter on both. Creatures with splinter counters can't be fragmented.)

card.name: A World Worth Fighting For
card.text: Whenever you cast your first creature spell each turn, put a heart counter on this enchantment. Do the same for noncreature spells and soul counters. Remove a heart counter and a soul counter from this enchantment: Exile the top card of your library. You may play it this turn.

card.name: Kraz, Head Engineer
card.text: Artifact creatures you control have haste. When Kraz enters and at the beginning of your upkeep, create a 0/0 colorless Construct artifact creature token with "This creature gets +1/+1 for each artifact you control." Sacrifice it at the beginning of the next end step.

card.name: Eccentric Geneticist
card.text: This creature gets +1/+1 as long as you control another creature with mana value 2 or greater. This creature gets +1/+1 and has vigilance as long as you control another creature with mana value 4 or greater. This creature gets +1/+1 and has trample as long as you control another creature with mana value 6 or greater.

card.name: Gloamveil Trackers
card.text: Trample Whenever you cast your first creature spell each turn, investigate. At the beginning of combat on your turn, until end of turn, Clues you control become 3/3 artifact creatures with trample and "Whenever this creature deals combat damage to a player, sacrifice it. If you do, draw a card."

card.name: Kozilek, the Bonds Unmade
card.text: Ward—Discard two cards. Your maximum hand size is twelve. Whenever you cast this spell or Kozilek attacks, draw five cards and add five {C}. Until end of turn, you don't lose this mana as steps and phases end.

card.name: Emrakul, the Sky Sundered
card.text: When you cast this spell, each opponent exiles their hand. You may cast a spell from among those cards without paying its mana cost. Flying, trample As long as an opponent has one or fewer cards in hand, Emrakul has hexproof.

card.name: Keeper's Peninsula
card.text: This land enters tapped. {T}: Add {C}, {W}, or {U}.

card.name: Dusk Vantage
card.text: This land enters tapped. {T}: Add {C}, {U}, or {B}.

card.name: Lost Settlement
card.text: This land enters tapped. {T}: Add {C}, {B}, or {R}.

card.name: Cliffrest Tributary
card.text: This land enters tapped. {T}: Add {C}, {R}, or {G}.

card.name: Secluded Avenue
card.text: This land enters tapped. {T}: Add {C}, {W}, or {B}.

card.name: Cataract Valley
card.text: This land enters tapped.[b] [/b]{T}: Add {C}, {U}, or {R}.

card.name: Outlands Hamlet
card.text: This land enters tapped. {T}: Add {C}, {B}, or {G}.

card.name: Bronzeglade Peaks
card.text: This land enters tapped. {T}: Add {C}, {R}, or {W}.

card.name: Lakewatch Ruins
card.text: This land enters tapped. {T}: Add {C}, {G}, or {U}.

card.name: Treasure SGP
card.text: {T}, Sacrifice this artifact: Add one mana of any color.

card.name: Forge in Anguish
card.text: As an additional cost to cast this spell, discard a card or pay {1}. Target creature you control gets +3/+1 and gains first strike and trample until end of turn.

card.name: Clue SGP
card.text: {2}, Sacrifice this artifact: Draw a card.

card.name: What Remains of Frossenhold
card.text: {T}: Add {C}. {5}: This land becomes a 4/4 Eldrazi land creature until end of turn.

card.name: Eldrazi Angel SGP
card.text: Flying

card.name: Thopter SGP
card.text: Flying

card.name: In Strength Entwined_Promo
card.text: Creature tokens you control get +1/+1.

card.name: Gene Recombinators_Promo
card.text: {1}, Sacrifice two creatures: Create an X/X green Ooze creature token, where X is the total power of the sacrificed creatures. Activate only as a sorcery. Coalition – Whenever this creature attacks with one or more tokens, create a token that's a copy of target token you control.

card.name: Rend_Promo
card.text: Fragment target creature you control.

card.name: Grand Awakening_Promo
card.text: Search your library for a creature card with mana value X or less, put it onto the battlefield, then shuffle. Create a token that's a copy of it, except it isn't legendary and has haste and "Sacrifice this creature at the beginning of the next end step."

card.name: Bear Witness_Promo
card.text: Fragment all creatures you control.

card.name: Bird SGP
card.text: Flying

card.name: Jellyfish Horror SGP
card.text: Flying

card.name: Esme, Lost to Avarice
card.text: Once each turn, when the void calls you, each opponent loses 1 life and you gain 1 life. (During your turn, the void calls you when a card enters your graveyard from your hand or library.) {3}{B}{B}: If there are seven or more cards in your graveyard, Esme gains flying and becomes a 7/7 Horror in addition to her other types. Activate only as a sorcery.

card.name: Construct SGP
card.text: This creature gets +1/+1 for each artifact you control.

card.name: Darkwood Guerrillas
card.text: First strike When this creature enters, look at the top X cards of your library, where X is the number of artifacts you control. Exile up to two of them and put the rest on the bottom of your library in any order. Whenever this creature attacks, you may play a card exiled with it until end of turn.

card.name: Exander, Half-Forgotten
card.text: Menace At the beginning of your end step, if the void called you this turn, create a 2/1 black Warlock creature token. (During your turn, the void calls you when a card enters your graveyard from your hand or library.)

card.name: The West District Union
card.text: Whenever a creature token you control attacks, it gains indestructible until end of turn. At the beginning of your end step, draw a card if you control more creatures than each opponent. If you don't, create a 1/1 white Human creature token.

card.name: Kozilek's Hexer // Nullstorm
card.text:
Prowess You may spend {C} as though it were mana of any color to cast instant or sorcery spells.
---
Exile target card from your graveyard. Copy it. You may cast the copy without paying its mana cost if that spell is an instant or sorcery spell with mana value 4 or less.

card.name: Lantern in the Dark // Leagues Below
card.text:
Lifelink
---
Surveil 2, then draw two cards. You lose 2 life. (Cast this from your hand or a copy from the battlefield once.)

card.name: Zaila, Her Will Be Done
card.text: Whenever a nontoken creature you control enters, you may fragment it. (Create a 1/1 token copy of it and put a splinter counter on both. Creatures with splinter counters can't be fragmented.) [+1]: Draw a card. Add {C}{C}. [-2]: Zaila deals damage to target creature equal to the number of creatures you control. [-7]: Draw three cards. You get an emblem with "Creatures you control are 4/4 Eldrazi Angels with flying."

card.name: Village Steeples
card.text: This land enters tapped. {T}: Add {C}, {G}, or {W}.

card.name: Copy SGP
card.text: This token can be used to represent a copy of something else.

card.name: Malignant Manaphage
card.text: Devoid (This card has no color.) Flash When this creature enters, if it was cast, up to one target spell becomes a copy of it, except it doesn't have the following abilities. Protection from Eldrazi
